title: Amethyst Pickaxes
description: Adds the Amethyst Pickaxe that lets you mine a 3x3 area with a single swing of your pickaxe, inspired by Donut SMP.
body:
# Amethyst Pickaxes

> Mine a full 3x3 area with a single swing: the legendary Amethyst Pickaxe, inspired by Donut SMP, now in your world.

![pickaxe tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddcc0b8cc7d586b32b02b3686d673a5a78523aee.png)

---

## What is this?

Amethyst Pickaxes adds a custom **Amethyst** enchantment to Minecraft that lets you mine a full 3x3 area with a single swing of your pickaxe.

Inspired by the iconic Amethyst Pickaxe from the **Donut SMP**, this datapack brings that same legendary item into your own world. Enchant a pickaxe with the Amethyst Enchantment (obtained from trading with villagers) at an anvil.

---

## Features

- **3x3 area mining** — break 9 blocks in one swing
- **Custom enchantment** — obtainable through trading with villagers

---

## Installation

1. Download `amethyst-1.0.0.jar`
2. Drop it into your world's `mods` folder
3. Find the Amethyst enchantment and get mining

---

## Compatibility

| Loader | Supported |
|--------|-----------|
| Fabric | Yes |
| Quilt | Yes |
| NeoForge | Yes |
| Forge | Yes |

**Requires Minecraft 1.21+**

---

*Made by qlttqb — inspired by the Donut SMP Amethyst Pickaxe.*
